design_plan: rng=42; AIDA validated; hero max-width math ~1120px => 2–3 lines; bento + compare grids use grid-auto-flow:dense; button contrast checked on #0a0a0a/#fff; ambient layers fixed; GSAP guarded.
headline: Super vs Folk — Personal AI Agents Compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Folk. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Folk

summary: A fair, source‑grounded comparison of Super and Folk for people evaluating personal AI agents. Folk sits within the broader automation and agent conversation; Super is purpose‑built for real computer‑use workflows, with a reusable computer-use cache that makes repeated work cheaper and more reliable over time.
